rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF MARTIN RYAN, CLAIRE RYAN Notice Of Motions To Compel is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to July 14, 2017 exchange. Motion is GRANTED as to the November 2013 e-mail chain. The part of the chain from Katz to Hughes may remain redacted. Requests for sanctions are denied. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VO V DUONG ET AL VS. JOCK TOON LOUEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT JOCK LOUEY, PO LOUEY DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to December 1, 2020 per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CATHOLIC CHARITIES CYO OF THE ARCHDIOCESE VS. DONALD COBBS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT DONALD COBB DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PHUONG T. NGUYEN VS. SHARAD JAIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint By Defendants Crashpadz Inc., Sfo Crashpad Llc, Sfc Crashpad Llc, Zameer Riaz Azam, Abdul Azam, And Jason Voelker; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jason Voelker
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT ZAMEER AZAM, ABDUL AZAM, CRASHPADZ INC, SFC CRASHPAD LLC, SFO CRASHPAD LLC, JASON VOELKER Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint By Defendants Crashpadz Inc., Sfo Crashpad Llc, Sfc Crashpad Llc, Zameer Riaz Azam, Abdul Azam, And Jason Voelker is OFF CALENDAR. Improper notice per CCP 1167.4. If defendants re-file the motion, defendants should address the proof of service on file and familiarize themselves with Borsuk v. Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT KEESHEMAH JOHNSON DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SLADE VS. JEREMY GARDNER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 24, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT KINNARD HOCKENHULL DEMURRER to COMPLAINT Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/CFH)
